title: CommitToken.v1
description: Single-use execution authorization token. Bound to draft+ceilings+epoch+TTL. Per HELM-RFC-0001.

token_hash.description: SHA-256 of the opaque token material

bound_draft_hash.description: Hash of the tool_call_draft this token authorizes

bound_ceilings_hash.description: Hash of the ceilings_snapshot at decision time

bound_epoch.description: Policy epoch this token is valid for

bound_decision_id.description: The AuthorizationDecision that issued this token

preflight_required.description: Whether preflight must be called before commit

issued_at.description: Authority time when token was issued

consumed.description: Whether this token has been consumed (single-use enforcement)

consumed_at.description: Authority time when token was consumed

signature.description: Authority Court signature over the token binding fields
